name: National Flood Hazard Layer
use_in_app: Address point flood-zone check for the demo vertical slice.
notes: The app checks the saved address point against the locally loaded flood polygon layer. This is not a parcel determination.

name: Fire Hazard Severity Zones
use_in_app: Address point wildfire-zone check and map display.
notes: The app checks the saved address point against the locally loaded Fire Hazard Severity Zone polygon layer. This does not capture smoke, evacuation, ember, or power-shutoff risk.

name: Fault and earthquake information
geographic_scope: United States, including Bay Area context
use_in_app: Mapped fault proximity check, map display, and live-earthquake context.
notes: The app checks approximate address proximity to loaded mapped fault lines. This is not a full earthquake-risk, liquefaction, shaking-intensity, building-safety, or parcel determination.

name: Alameda County Emergency Site
use_in_app: Countywide preparedness and source transparency.
notes: Countywide official emergency resource used for general preparedness guidance.

name: City of Oakland 2021-2026 Local Hazard Mitigation Plan
use_in_app: Oakland-specific planning context and source registry coverage.
notes: Existing hazard dataset uses Oakland LHMP-style content; more page-level citations should be added before stronger claims.

name: City of Berkeley 2024 Local Hazard Mitigation Plan
use_in_app: Berkeley jurisdiction context when a Berkeley location is resolved.
notes: Official plan page confirmed; user-provided 2024 PDF was extracted locally for earthquake, WUI fire, and flood resident guidance.

name: Fire Weather and Evacuation
use_in_app: Berkeley wildfire evacuation and fire-weather guidance, especially for hills and Fire Zone context.
notes: Official Berkeley page says residents in the Berkeley Hills should leave before a fire starts when the Fire Department declares Extreme Fire Weather, and all residents should use emergency alerts and evacuation planning.

name: 2024 Tri-City Multi-jurisdictional Local Hazard Mitigation Plan
agency: Cities of Fremont, Newark, and Union City
use_in_app: Tri-City jurisdiction context when a covered city is resolved.
notes: Official source page confirmed; annex-specific claims still need more reviewed chunks.

name: Climate Adaptation and Hazard Mitigation Plan
use_in_app: City of Alameda jurisdiction context when Alameda is resolved.
notes: Official source page confirmed; user-provided Volume 2 PDF was extracted locally for Dublin, Livermore, and Pleasanton resident guidance.

name: Hayward Local Resilience Plan
use_in_app: Hayward jurisdiction context when Hayward is resolved.
notes: Official source page confirmed; detailed claims still need more reviewed chunks.

name: Tri-Valley Local Hazard Mitigation Plan
agency: Cities of Dublin, Livermore, and Pleasanton
use_in_app: Tri-Valley jurisdiction context when a covered city is resolved.
notes: Official source page confirmed; detailed claims still need more reviewed chunks.

name: Albany Hazard Mitigation
use_in_app: Albany jurisdiction context when Albany is resolved.
notes: Official Fire Department page confirms the LHMP covers earthquakes, wildfires, flooding, and other emergencies; full plan extraction still needed.

name: 2025-2030 Local Hazard Mitigation Plan
use_in_app: Emeryville jurisdiction context when Emeryville is resolved.
notes: Official LHMP page confirmed; user-provided 2025-2030 PDF was extracted locally for earthquake, flood, wildfire, urban fire, and dam-inundation resident guidance.

name: Draft Local Hazard Mitigation Plan
use_in_app: Piedmont jurisdiction context when Piedmont is resolved.
notes: Official draft LHMP page confirmed; use as draft plan context until final plan details are extracted. Limited flood context is available from 2025 LHMP meeting materials.

name: Environmental Hazards Element Update
use_in_app: San Leandro hazard context when San Leandro is resolved.
notes: Official hazard element source confirmed; not labeled as a full LHMP.

name: Alameda County Local Hazard Mitigation Plan
use_in_app: Countywide fallback mitigation context and unincorporated-area source registry coverage.
notes: Official county mitigation planning page confirmed; use countywide context unless community-specific chunks are reviewed.

name: Build A Kit
use_in_app: Preparedness action guidance.
notes: General emergency kit guidance.

name: Make A Plan
use_in_app: Household planning guidance.
notes: General household emergency planning guidance.

name: Floods
use_in_app: Flood preparedness and response wording.
notes: Used for flood action guidance.

name: Earthquakes
use_in_app: Earthquake preparedness wording.
notes: Used for earthquake action guidance.

name: Recovering from Disaster
use_in_app: Recovery readiness questions and limitations.
notes: Used to make recovery planning visible in the demo.
